# Phase-08 — Data Governance & Quality

> Make data trustworthy, discoverable, and compliant across the enterprise.
>
> Suggested timeline: **Weeks 30-32**

Each prompt below instructs GitHub Copilot to generate exactly one standalone Markdown
chapter with all 50 mandatory sections (Azure-primary, ~60/30/10 Azure/OSS/AWS+GCP).

| # | Prompt | Generates | Study time |
|---|--------|-----------|------------|
| 01 | [Data Governance Foundations](01_Data_Governance_Foundations.prompt.md) | `Data_Governance_Foundations.md` | 60 min + 3h |
| 02 | [Data Catalog and Lineage](02_Data_Catalog_and_Lineage.prompt.md) | `Data_Catalog_and_Lineage.md` | 60 min + 3h |
| 03 | [Data Quality with Great Expectations](03_Data_Quality_with_Great_Expectations.prompt.md) | `Data_Quality.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 04 | [Metadata Management: OpenMetadata and Atlas](04_Metadata_Management_OpenMetadata_and_Atlas.prompt.md) | `Metadata_Management.md` | 60 min + 3h |
| 05 | [Master Data Management](05_Master_Data_Management.prompt.md) | `Master_Data_Management.md` | 60 min + 3h |
| 06 | [Microsoft Purview](06_Microsoft_Purview.prompt.md) | `Microsoft_Purview.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 07 | [Data Contracts](07_Data_Contracts.prompt.md) | `Data_Contracts.md` | 45 min + 3h |

## How to run
Open a prompt file in VS Code and run it with GitHub Copilot (agent mode), or reference it
from Copilot Chat. It will produce the corresponding `.md` chapter listed above.
